case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ALFREDO ESCOBAR SALINAS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2020 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SALINAS, ALFREDO ESCOBAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ALFREDO ESCOBAR SALINAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALINAS, ALFREDO ESCOBAR $2,190.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,290.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED SEP-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SALINAS, ALFREDO ESCOBAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2019 - CONTINUED DUE TO CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-09-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES ADVISED OF THE CONTINUANCE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
